summary: Maria Santos met with Brianna Foster and Leo Marquez to address a serious six-hour outage on March 10-11 that caused a loss of visibility in Aegis Detect, breaching their 99.5% uptime SLA. The customer expressed eroded confidence in platform reliability and revealed they are actively evaluating a competitor, SentinelShield, which is offering aggressive pricing and a 99.9% SLA. Additional concerns included platform stagnation, upcoming compliance needs (SOC 2, HIPAA), and budget constraints going into renewal. Maria outlined next steps including a renewal proposal with an SLA credit, pricing adjustments, access to the upcoming Comply v2 product, and an engineering call to address Leo's infrastructure concerns.
actionItems: Maria Santos: Send full technical remediation report and coordinate an engineering call with Aegis engineering team for Leo by early next week
Maria Santos: Deliver a renewal proposal by Thursday including SLA credit, revised pricing, and Comply v2 access bundled in
Maria Santos: Arrange a demo or early preview of Aegis Comply v2 for Brianna and Leo before renewal closes
Brianna Foster: Review the renewal proposal and provide feedback with enough time for legal to finalize by first week of April

keyMoments.text: Brianna describes the six-hour Aegis Detect outage on March 10-11, citing lost visibility, compliance obligations, and the failure to be proactively notified by Aegis.
keyMoments.speaker: Brianna Foster

keyMoments.text: Brianna reveals they have been evaluating competitor SentinelShield, which reached out right after the outage and is offering more aggressive pricing and a 99.9% uptime SLA.
keyMoments.speaker: Brianna Foster

keyMoments.text: Maria discloses that Aegis Comply v2 launching April 7th includes on-demand SOC 2, HIPAA, PCI DSS, and ISO 27001 reporting, directly addressing the customer's upcoming compliance needs.
keyMoments.speaker: Maria Santos

keyMoments.text: Leo states that the engineering call on infrastructure remediation is the deciding factor for his technical recommendation on whether to stay with Aegis.
keyMoments.speaker: Leo Marquez
